testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'Mac.powerhub', ip: '2a0a:ef40:5bc:2701:20ef:d9b4:d305:d5ab%en0'
